description: Delta tail at positive extreme. barDelta=100, MaxDelta=100 (exact tail). tailRatio=1.0 >= 0.95 threshold. Direction=-1 (tail at +extreme implies bearish exhaustion). For test bars built via Levels, MaxDelta=0 so detector uses delta as the trivial extreme (ratio=1.0).

bar.notes: barDelta=100 (50+50+0=100). MaxDelta=0 (no AddTrade path). Detector treats extreme=delta, ratio=1.0 >= 0.95.
